title: handoff.md (plan/sub-plan) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for plan-tree handoff.md files. Strict append-only newest-first per Plan 83 SP02 session-continuity protocol + Plan 81 SP13 Session 2 A23. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.4 (2026-05-18).
design_source: alignment/plans-folder-governance.md Session 2 A23 + Plan 83 SP02 session-continuity-protocol

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (append-only enforcement) + skill session-close-and-handoff + librarian plan-index
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: Append-only; historical session entries never edited in place

append_only_rationale: No in-place edits to historical session entries. New session entries prepend at top (newest-first). Historical entries are immutable record of plan execution arc.
newest_first_rationale: Repository convention — readers scroll top to find latest session; pre-existing entries shift downward without modification.
